command.mymod.pgp.description: Generate keys, encrypt, decrypt, sign, and verify using OpenPGP.
command.mymod.pgp.encrypt.description: Encrypt a message with the current PGP public key.
command.mymod.pgp.decrypt.description: Decrypt an armored PGP message with the current private key.
command.mymod.pgp.sign.description: Sign a message with the current PGP private key.
command.mymod.pgp.verify.description: Verify a signed message with the current PGP public key.
